text.title: AI Research Tool Categories Taxonomy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team uses ChatGPT for everything; misses citation rigour where it matters.
antipattern.root-cause: No taxonomy — all questions funnel through one tool.
antipattern.fix: Adopt four-category split; route per question type.

antipattern.symptom: Academic-claim question answered by web-search tool; loses peer-review filter.
antipattern.fix: Tag each category; force matching evidence_type to corpus bias.

antipattern.symptom: Team buys Elicit before clarifying whether they need meta-analysis or live web data.
antipattern.root-cause: Selected product by hype, not category fit.
antipattern.fix: Always pick category first; product within category second.
